headline: Rosenblatt Upgrades Arista Networks (ANET) Stock to Buy from Neutral
summary: Arista Networks, Inc. (NYSE:ANET) is one of the Best Long Term Growth Stocks to Invest In According to Billionaires. On April 7, Rosenblatt upgraded the company’s stock to “Buy” from “Neutral,” raising the price objective to $180 from the previous target of $165. The firm believes it has gained more confidence in Arista Networks, Inc. (NYSE:ANET)’s XPO strategy. […]
